meaning: n.改革论者,进步论者adj.前进的,(税收)累进的,进步的
examples: One prominent symptom of the disease is progressive loss of memory.
Willan was able to point to the progressive changes he had already introduced.
Halsey was identified as a leading proponent of the values of progressive education.
It seems that in this progressive mood, sitting on the fence has become increasingly uncomfortable.
For thirty years, Australia's The Church has produced music along the lines of New Wave, psychedelic, progressive-rock.
